title: hieracium glaucum var. arvetii
intro: Hieracium glaucum var. arvetii is a plant species that belongs to the dandelion family and is native to Europe. It is also known as hawk's beard or false hawk's beard, and its medicinal properties include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Hieracium glaucum var. arvetii include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as soothing digestive problems. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
